title: Midori
originalTitle: 地下幻燈劇画 少女椿
tmdbOverview: After losing her parents, young flower selling Midori is put up by a fairground group. She is abused and forced to slavery, until the arrival of an enigmatic magician of short stature, who gives her hope for a better future.
synopsis: Midori (1992) is a animation, drama and horror film from Japan. It carries a 6.4 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1990s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (FR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
